scripts.e2e: docker compose --profile e2e up --build -d --wait && cd apps/e2e && npx playwright test
scripts.e2e:ui: docker compose --profile e2e up --build -d --wait && cd apps/e2e && npx playwright test --ui
scripts.e2e:local: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.override.local.yml --profile e2e up --build -d --wait && cd apps/e2e && npx playwright test
scripts.e2e:local:ui: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.override.local.yml --profile e2e up --build -d --wait && cd apps/e2e && npx playwright test --ui
scripts.e2e:local:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.override.local.yml --profile e2e down -v
